description: Golden question set for Knowledge Hub eval (#11). Corpus = seed_docs/ (ShopFlow mock e-commerce). Three categories: answerable (found + correct citation), out_of_scope (abstain), conflict (report both sides). Run against the deployed HF Space or a local instance with a token set.

questions.question: Which HTTP header carries the authentication token?
questions.expected_answer: The bearer token is sent in the Authorization header.

questions.question: How long are access tokens valid before they expire?
questions.expected_answer: Access tokens are valid for 24 hours; after that the client must log in again.

questions.question: Does ShopFlow issue refresh tokens?
questions.expected_answer: No. ShopFlow does not currently issue refresh tokens; clients re-login after expiry.

questions.question: How long is a password reset link valid, and how many times can it be used?
questions.expected_answer: The reset link is valid for one hour and can be used only once.

questions.question: What HTTP status does POST /cart/items return when the requested quantity exceeds available inventory?
Under which order statuses can an order be cancelled?
questions.expected_answer: Only orders in pending or paid status can be cancelled; a shipped order cannot be cancelled (responds 409) and must be returned instead.

questions.question: What are the possible statuses an order can have?
questions.expected_answer: pending, paid, shipped, delivered, or cancelled.

questions.question: How long are inactive carts kept before being cleared?
questions.expected_answer: Carts are persisted for 30 days of inactivity before being cleared.

questions.question: Once a refund is approved, how long does it take to appear?
questions.expected_answer: Typically 5 to 7 business days, depending on the card issuer.

questions.question: What is the default and maximum page_size when listing products?
questions.expected_answer: Default page_size is 20 and the maximum is 100.

questions.question: What happens to the cart if payment fails during checkout?
questions.expected_answer: If payment fails the order is not created and the cart is preserved (the API responds 402 on payment capture failure).

questions.question: What is ShopFlow's monthly subscription pricing?
questions.expected_answer: Abstain — the documents do not contain subscription pricing.

questions.question: Which programming language and framework is the ShopFlow backend built with?
questions.expected_answer: Abstain — the documents do not state the backend language or framework.

questions.question: What is ShopFlow's customer support phone number?
questions.expected_answer: Abstain — no support phone number appears in the documents.

questions.question: What is ShopFlow's uptime or availability SLA?
questions.expected_answer: Abstain — the documents do not mention an uptime or availability SLA.

questions.question: What is the return window for getting a refund?
questions.expected_answer: Conflict — the 2022 refund policy says 14 days from delivery, while the 2024 refund policy says 30 days. Both should be reported without choosing a side.

questions.question: How many days after delivery do I have to return an item for a refund?
questions.expected_answer: Conflict — 14 days per the 2022 policy versus 30 days per the 2024 policy.

questions.question: Can I return an item 20 days after delivery for a refund?
questions.expected_answer: Conflict — the 2022 policy says no (past the 14-day window), but the 2024 policy says yes (within 30 days). Both should be reported.
